3228090.name: Space Saber
3228090.description:
Check your reflexes in this virtual reality game by immersing yourself into space accompanied by energetic and wild music where you'll have to intercept explosive mines with you lightsaber before they reach you.

Save your score and challenge your friends to break your score !
